product.name: Amazon Basics Office Chair Mat for Low Pile Carpeted Floors, 46" x 60", Clear
features: CARPET-FRIENDLY: Clear, lightweight plastic chair mat protects carpeting and rugs from wear caused by rolling desk chairs; ideal for home or office workspaces
PROTECTIVE & SMOOTH: Flat plastic mat surface allows for seamless chair movement while defending carpet against snags, spills, and dirt
STUDDED DESIGN: Desk chair mat with underside grips carpet to prevent slippage and movement
